mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PHONE, MEMBER_NAME ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{memberName} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email}

SELECT MEMBER_ID as memberId, MEMBER_PW as memberPw, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PHONE, JOIN_DATE as joinDate, STATUS, ROLE, PROFILE_IMG as profileImg, MEMBER_NAME AS memberName
FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_PW = #{memberPw}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MEMBER_PW = #{memberPw} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
